text:
SaaS Landing Page


"Build a modern SaaS landing page with a dark black background, red accent color, hero section with headline and CTA button, features grid with icons, pricing cards with free and pro tiers, and a footer"

Everything looks correct. All imports resolve, components are properly typed, all routes and exports are wired up. The page is complete and production-ready.

---

✓ **All tasks complete!**

**Pages built:**
- `Index.tsx` — Full SaaS landing page (single-page scroll)

**Components created:**
- `Navbar` — Fixed glass-morphism nav with mobile hamburger menu, scroll-aware transparency, and smooth anchor navigation
- `HeroSection` — Animated badge, giant headline with red gradient text, dual CTAs, stat grid, floating dashboard mockup
- `FeaturesSection` — 6-feature grid with Lucide icons, hover effects, highlight card, and company trust logos
- `PricingSection` — Monthly/Annual billing toggle, Free & Pro cards with full feature comparison, Enterprise contact row
- `FooterSection` — 4-column link grid, social icons, newsletter subscription input, system status indicator

**Design system:**
- `index.css` — Dark tokens (`#000` background, `#E8192C` red accent), Space Grotesk + Inter fonts, custom glow/animation utilities
- `tailwind.config.ts` — Brand color palette (`brand-red`, `surface`), custom keyframes (float, fade-up, pulse-red), font families registered

**Aesthetic:** High-contrast dark SaaS — pure black base, crimson red accents with glow effects, editorial typography hierarchy, hero grid texture, and smooth scroll animations throughout.
